title: I Want Ice Cream
description: Dive into the frosty fun of I Want Ice Cream ! In this delightful adventure, you take on the role of an adorable penguin living in the heart of Antarctica. Your mission? Navigate the icy landscape, dodge obstacles, and find the hidden ice cream treats. With charming, cartoonish graphics and a catchy soundtrack, this game promises hours of entertainment for players of all ages.
instructions: Use the arrow keys to move the penguin and get the penguin to the ice cream
